customHandlers.itunesSearchHandler: function(ctx) { let fetchJson = (url) => { let resp = req(url, { headers: { 'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0' } }); return JSON.parse(resp.content); }; let keyword = encodeURIComponent(ctx.wd); let url = `https://itunes.apple.com/search?term=${keyword}&limit=30&entity=song`; let json = fetchJson(url); let results = json.results || []; return results.map(item => ({ vod_id: item.previewUrl + '###single', vod_name: `${item.trackName} - ${item.artistName}`, vod_pic: item.artworkUrl100 || def_pic, vod_remarks: `рҹҺө ${item.collectionName}  (иҜ•еҗ¬зүҮж®ө: ${(item.trackTimeMillis / 1000).toFixed(0)}з§’)` })); }
